isi.driveFileNames: FIVE O ONE - Set It Off.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric FIVE O ONE - Set It Off

Romanization

JUST SET IT OFF

ajik bameun kkeutnaji anasseo
dosineun sumeul jugin chae seo isseo
yeomyeongi sijakdoen i sunggan
We don’t slow down,
Go higher

simjangi dugeunggeoryeo,
balkkeute bureul butyeo
meomchul saenggak ttawin haji ma
urin jumbidwaesseuni nal ttarawa
i biteue modeun
naeireul georeo

Light over dark
Wake up, turn it round
No more waiting,
Move now

SET IT OFF
(SET IT OFF)

eodumeun kkeuteul hyanghagetjiman
bicheun heorageul guhaji ana
duryeoum ajik nama itdamyeon
ije domangchil iyuneun eopseo

tteugeopge taoreuneun
taeyangi neol bichumyeon
bultaneun rideume neoreul matgyeo bwa
naega jeungmyeonghal teni baro i sunggan
deullini i noraega
bollyumeul nopyeo

Light over dark
Wake up, turn it round
No more waiting,
Move now

SET IT OFF
(SET IT OFF)

I see the fire burn
I see the road tonight
aswium ttawin deonjyeobeoryeo
Run to Run to
We gotta reach it now
Before the fear breaks in
Run into the dream tonight
SET IT OFF

Hangeul

JUST SET IT OFF

아직 밤은 끝나지 않았어
도시는 숨을 죽인 채 서 있어
여명이 시작된 이 순간
We don’t slow down,
Go higher

심장이 두근거려,
발끝에 불을 붙여
멈출 생각 따윈 하지 마
우린 준비됐으니 날 따라와
이 비트에 모든
내일을 걸어

Light over dark
Wake up, turn it round
No more waiting,
Move now

SET IT OFF
(SET IT OFF)

어둠은 끝을 향하겠지만
빛은 허락을 구하지 않아
두려움 아직 남아 있다면
이제 도망칠 이유는 없어

뜨겁게 타오르는
태양이 널 비추면
불타는 리듬에 너를 맡겨 봐
내가 증명할 테니 바로 이 순간
들리니 이 노래가
볼륨을 높여

Light over dark
Wake up, turn it round
No more waiting,
Move now

SET IT OFF
(SET IT OFF)

I see the fire burn
I see the road tonight
아쉬움 따윈 던져버려
Run to Run to
We gotta reach it now
Before the fear breaks in
Run into the dream tonight
SET IT OFF

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BORAN - Imperfection

Romanization

Babe I, see through you
Your faults and your imperfections

Most people lie bout who they are
But your weakness made me love you more
And I’m like you

I see myself in the tears in your eyes
You and I, you and I
Imperfectly perfect together we fly
I think I might fall for you, you
I think I might fall for you

You got so much pressure it’s too much to take
I get it I’ve been there cause people are fake
They tell you what to want
They tell you what you need to be

Expectations, Weigh too heavily
I won’t settle cause I need my dreams
And you’re like me

I see myself in the tears in your eyes
You and I, you and I
Imperfectly perfect together we fly
I think I might fall for you, you
I think I might fall for you
You, you
I think I might fall for you


Hangeul

Babe I, see through you
Your faults and your imperfections

Most people lie bout who they are
But your weakness made me love you more
And I’m like you

I see myself in the tears in your eyes
You and I, you and I
Imperfectly perfect together we fly
I think I might fall for you, you
I think I might fall for you

You got so much pressure it’s too much to take
I get it I’ve been there cause people are fake
They tell you what to want
They tell you what you need to be

Expectations, Weigh too heavily
I won’t settle cause I need my dreams
And you’re like me

I see myself in the tears in your eyes
You and I, you and I
Imperfectly perfect together we fly
I think I might fall for you, you
I think I might fall for you
You, you
I think I might fall for you

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BORAN - Petite Warrior

Romanization

You lift me way up
deo naeun sarami doego sipge mandeureo
You got me, I got you

machi jip gata anjeonhae
amudo ol su eomneun neoui sesang
na sal geot gata
gyesok ireoge anajwo

yeojeonsaga doen geot cheoreom mwodeun hal su itge
nega dwie itdago saenggakhamyeon anjeonhae
dasi ssaul himi saenggyeo neon naui Home

naneun joeun sarami doego sipeo eonjena
geumanhaedo doendagodeul naege malhajiman
jikigo sipeun uimideuri isseo
You know better than me

You lift me way up
neowa salmeul saranaego sipeo oraedorok
You got me, I got you

gipeun bam sai nal ssitgyeonae
neoui sumeun dasigeum nal salligo
siganeul eolligo
gyesok ireoge anajwo

yeojeonsaga doen geot cheoreom mwodeun hal su itge
nega dwie itdago saenggakhamyeon anjeonhae
dasi ssaul himi saenggyeo neon naui Home

naneun joeun sarami doego sipeo eonjena
geumanhaedo doendagodeul naege malhajiman
jikigo sipeun uimideuri isseo
You know better than me

yeojeonsaga doen geot cheoreom mwodeun hal su itge
nega dwie itdago saenggakhamyeon anjeonhae
dasi ssaul himi saenggyeo neon naui Home

naneun joeun sarami doego sipeo eonjena
geumanhaedo doendagodeul naege malhajiman
jikigo sipeun uimideuri isseo
You know better than me


Hangeul

You lift me way up
더 나은 사람이 되고 싶게 만들어
You got me, I got you

마치 집 같아 안전해
아무도 올 수 없는 너의 세상
나 살 것 같아
계속 이렇게 안아줘

여전사가 된 것 처럼 뭐든 할 수 있게
네가 뒤에 있다고 생각하면 안전해
다시 싸울 힘이 생겨 넌 나의 Home

나는 좋은 사람이 되고 싶어 언제나
그만해도 된다고들 내게 말하지만
지키고 싶은 의미들이 있어
You know better than me

You lift me way up
너와 삶을 살아내고 싶어 오래도록
You got me, I got you

깊은 밤 사이 날 씻겨내
너의 숨은 다시금 날 살리고
시간을 얼리고
계속 이렇게 안아줘

여전사가 된 것 처럼 뭐든 할 수 있게
네가 뒤에 있다고 생각하면 안전해

Romanization

They told me not to try

Romanization

Mistook me for the shy type
But that was your mistake boy yeah

you’d like that

Sorry I don’t measure up to fit the picture
that you’ve taken
Sorry I won’t be competin’ for no second place
I’ll make it

Clever

Like a diamond
I’m so
Clever
I know

Don’t you ever forget that
I got power
I’m so
Clever
I know

Takin’ a bow
I made it out

isi.lyrics:
Lyric BORAN - Love, not money

Romanization

I just want your love, not money
Honesty is all I wanted
Can we say something real
Are you even listening?

I just want your love, not money
You've been buying silence from me
I can tell that you’re lonely there

I'm your love
I’m your life
Wish I could reach you
I’m always with you

In your eyes
You gave me life
Made me who I am
Can’t you take my hand

I just want your love, love, love, love

I just want your love, not money
Why you never smile? I wonder
How’d you get so cold
Is it so you’re in control?

Wish you could tell me why you’re afraid
Is keeping your distance keepin’ you safe?
I wish you knew me

I'm your love
I’m your life

isi.lyrics:
Lyric WHILE IN A WORLD - RISE

Romanization

You rise, and light begins to flow in
You rise, and waves carry me from shadows

Scattered like the sand, shaping me into something real
That’s when I found my skin
and I could feel everything within

You raise me up
I keep blooming through the cracks in concrete
I’m growing into a sound tree
You raise me up, I can stand with you
While in a world I get to spread

I love how you hold me every morning
I love how you see the pain I hide at night

That I can breathe day by day
‘cause I’m just here with you now
Wherever I am with you
it feels like home, hope it lasts forever

You raise me up
I keep blooming through the cracks in concrete
I’m growing into a sound tree
You raise me up, I can stand with you
While in a world I get to spread

Sometimes I run from the love you give
Afraid I can’t give it back
Still, looking at me with love
a love that never fades
a love that never ends
a love that’s forever

You raise me up
I keep blooming through the cracks in concrete
(Light, waves, morning and night,)
I’m growing into a sound tree
(it’s all love.)
You raise me up, I can stand with you
(Light, waves, morning and night,)
While in a world I get to spread
(it’s all love.)

Hangeul

You rise, and light begins to flow in
You rise, and waves carry me from shadows

Scattered like the sand, shaping me into something real
That’s when I found my skin
and I could feel everything within

You raise me up

While in a world I get to spread

Wherever I am with you
it feels like home, hope it lasts forever

You raise me up

a love that never fades

a love that’s forever

You raise me up
I keep blooming through the cracks in concrete
(Light, waves, morning and night,)
I’m growing into a sound tree
(it’s all love.)
You raise me up, I can stand with you
(Light, waves, morning and night,)
While in a world I get to spread
(it’s all love.)

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Joo Yein - 에필로그 (Epilogue)

Romanization

sireun nan marya aju oraejeombuteo
nega arajugil udukeoni meonghani gidarigo isseosseo

neoreul mannan geon ummyeongira mideosseo
uril gidaehaetgo yeongwonigil ganjeolhi gidohago baraesseo

geunyang gyeote jamsirado meomulgo sipeun maeumi
nado moreuge eoneusae ireoge jaranan geolkka

ijeya jogeumssik nan al geomman gata
neol noji mothan iyureul nan yeongwonhi moreul julman arasseo
gieoko meoreojin gieogeul kkeonae
amu mal eopdeon neol barabomyeo naneun mwoga geuri aswiwotdeon geolkka

uyeoniyeotdan geol geuttaeneun mollasseo
imi neon naege seupgwani dwaebeoryeoseo naneun alji mothaesseo

geujeo nege jamsi dongan seuchyeoganeun sarami
anigil baratdeon geon jeongmal yoksimin geolkka

ijeya jogeumssik nan al geomman gata
neol noji mothan iyureul nan yeongwonhi moreul julman arasseo
gieoko muneojin gieogeul kkeonae
gijeogi eopdan geol almyeonseodo naneun

ijeneun bummyeonghi na al geomman gata
honjaseo neol gidarida kkeutnae jujeoanjeun iyureul marya
sasil neon dan han beondo gidaehage han sunggani eopdan geol almyeonseodo
naneun aesseo moreun cheokhaesseotdeon geoya


Hangeul

실은 난 말야 아주 오래전부터
네가 알아주길 우두커니 멍하니 기다리고 있었어

너를 만난 건 운명이라 믿었어
우릴 기대했고 영원이길 간절히 기도하고 바랬어

그냥 곁에 잠시라도 머물고 싶은 마음이
나도 모르게 어느새 이렇게 자라난 걸까

이제야 조금씩 난 알 것만 같아
널 놓지 못한 이유를 난 영원히 모를 줄만 알았어
기어코 멀어진 기억을 꺼내
아무 말 없던 널 바라보며 나는 뭐가 그리 아쉬웠던 걸까

우연이였단 걸 그때는 몰랐어
이미 넌 나에게 습관이 돼버려서 나는 알지 못했어

그저 네게 잠시 동안 스쳐가는 사람이
아니길 바랐던 건 정말 욕심인 걸까

이제야 조금씩 난 알 것만 같아
널 놓지 못한 이유를 난 영원히 모를 줄만 알았어
기어코 무너진 기억을 꺼내
기적이 없단 걸 알면서도 나는

이제는 분명히 나 알 것만 같아
혼자서 널 기다리다 끝내 주저앉은 이유를 말야
사실 넌 단 한 번도 기대하게 한 순간이 없단 걸 알면서도
나는 애써 모른 척했었던 거야

혼자서 널 기다리다 끝내 주저앉은 이유를 말야 
사실 넌 단 한 번도 기대하게 한 순간이 없단 걸 알면서도 
나는 애써 모른 척했었던 거야
